portfolio: The public index and starting point for all these projects — an interactive, self-contained map.
sdts: A full-stack algorithmic-trading lab: secure UDP networking, a zero-config service mesh, and a real-time terminal dashboard for trading bots.
yx: A secure, payload-agnostic UDP packet protocol with HMAC integrity and a byte-identical wire format across Python and Swift.
yobro: A 100% local, always-on "Alexa clone" for macOS that wakes to "yo bro" and answers in a local LLM's words — no cloud.
gws: A fast, JSON-only CLI wrapper around Gmail and Google Sheets, built to be driven by AI agents and shell scripts.
laniakea: The plumbing layer of a personal AI supercluster — scripts that turn one Apple Silicon Mac into a LAN-reachable LLM/vision/inference stack.
dagsmith: `make` for AI work — a dependency-aware DAG orchestrator that dispatches build steps to pluggable AI executors, with a graph that can rewrite itself.
ybs: A spec-and-step build methodology that lets AI agents construct whole systems autonomously, with traceability and verification baked in.
saixha: An S-expression AI shell ("Sasha") where the LLM, a Lisp interpreter, and Swift built-ins are all in-process evaluators.
murphy: A single-shot Swift AI agent engine for macOS — prompt in, structured JSONL events out, exit code.
agent: Drop a file into a folder and it runs — a no-polling macOS daemon that turns directories into a durable work queue.
mlx-router: A single OpenAI-compatible endpoint for Apple Silicon that routes each request to the right-sized local MLX model (7B chat → Coder-32B → 72B reasoning), with tool calling, KV-cache session affinity, and a self-managing daemon.
mind: The intelligence layer that reads your memories and learns "what usually happens next" — Memory stores what happened, Mind understands what it means.
memory: A passive, file-based memory layer that turns every agent turn, job, and command into a linked Obsidian-compatible note.
gmail-utility: A spec-first CLI that pulls your entire Gmail into a local, searchable archive (SQLite + .eml) with a paranoid two-stage trash — now built via a YBS/dagsmith 24-step system.
playground: An empty 2014-era scratch repo — a named placeholder.
